articles.headline: Why romantasy is everywhere for women: Stories that promise what real life can’t – love that lasts
articles.description: Romantasy – fantasy stories packed with romance, danger and increasingly “spicy” scenes – has surged in popularity. For many women, these stories offer something rare: The promise that emotional effort will be rewarded and love will last.

articles.headline: Megyn Kelly rips Melania Trump's Epstein denial: 'Why did she do this?'
articles.description: MAGA podcaster Megyn Kelly slammed First lady Melania Trump's denial of a relationship with late convicted child sex offender and financier Jeffrey Epstein. Kelly was responding to the bombshell comments this week and posed several questions during her podcas…

articles.headline: Stray bullet enters family's car on forest service road outside Mission, police issue warning
articles.description: Officials issue reminder about gun safety following a close call where a stray bullet entered a family’s car outside Mission, B.C.
